use_cases: E-commerce product display with quantity selection in shopping interfaces
Food and beverage ordering systems for coffee shops or restaurants
Shopping cart item management with shot/customization options
Order summary cards in checkout flows
ai_summary: A vibrant orange-gradient order item card component with quantity and customization controls (shots). Features glass-morphism styling with blur effects and smooth entrance animations. Designed for e-commerce and food ordering interfaces, displaying product images, titles, and detail options with interactive increment/decrement controls.
